cleaning_decision: Preserve user_id + record_sequence as the row-level grain
modelling_decision: Do not model or merge on duplicated user_id alone
business_reason: Repeated borrowers may represent multiple loan records. Direct user_id-only merging can create incorrect many-to-many joins and inflate the portfolio.

issue: Missing loan amount and non-positive loan amount
cleaning_decision: Create amount_missing_flag and amount_non_positive_flag; set non-positive amount values to missing before imputation
modelling_decision: Retain rows; impute amount later inside the modelling pipeline after splitting
business_reason: Amount is core exposure information. Missing amount is materially associated with default risk and should not be removed blindly.

cleaning_decision: Create missingness flags and fill missing categories as Unknown
modelling_decision: Retain after missingness treatment; monitor impact
business_reason: Employment missingness may carry risk signal and should remain auditable.

issue: Placeholder value 0 appears as unavailable information
cleaning_decision: Convert placeholder 0 to Unknown and create placeholder flags
modelling_decision: Use cautiously; consider excluding high-cardinality industry from the baseline model
business_reason: The value 0 is not a credible business category and likely represents unavailable source information.

issue: Repayment-derived variables may contain post-origination information
cleaning_decision: Keep variables in monitoring dataset but separate from baseline modelling dataset
modelling_decision: Exclude from first clean baseline default prediction model
business_reason: Repayment amounts may be observed after loan performance begins and can leak the target outcome.

cleaning_decision: Flag records for review; do not automatically delete
modelling_decision: Avoid using repayment-derived variables in baseline model
business_reason: This may reflect refinance, recoveries, payment timing, or original data-quality issues. It should be documented rather than silently removed.

affected_columns: gender, married, dependents, home, pincode, social_profile, is_verified
cleaning_decision: Retain for audit, monitoring, and fairness review
modelling_decision: Exclude high-risk sensitive/proxy variables from baseline model; review medium-risk variables before use
business_reason: These fields may encode sensitive, socioeconomic, geographic, social, or operational bias patterns and require governance review.
